chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.S- 588 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For hearing of main case. 3. For hearing of MA 7309/2025. 12.12.2025. M/s Riazuddin Qureshi and Muhammad Zafarullah, Advocates for applicant alongwith applicant. Ms. Safa Hisbani, A.P.G for State. = On the last several dates of hearing this Court had attempted to affect service on the respondent/complainant Nadeem, who is the brother of applicant Muhammad Bilal. Service has also been undertaken by way of publication in daily “Jang” dated 06th December, 2025 but none are present before this Court. No intimation is received. Accordingly, this is a matter concerning two blood brothers the impugned order dated 25.08.2025 is hereby set aside and the lis is remanded to the learned Ex-Officio Justice of Peace, Hyderabad to issue notice to the respondent-complainant as it was decided without affording proper hearing, and decide the Criminal Miscellaneous Application a fresh. If none appears on behalf of the respondent-complainant the Ex-Officio Justice of Peace is at liberty to decide the case as deemed fit and proper. The Criminal Miscellaneous Application stands disposed of in the above terms alongwith listed application. JUDGE Tufail
